section.contentHints: Grid of concept art and movie stills with light-box expansion.

designPlan.goal: Display the film's art in a way that feels like a physical art gallery.
designPlan.roleFit: Satisfies the visitor's goal to see more of the film's unique style.
designPlan.taskLoopFocus: Deepens the 'Read about the world' step.
designPlan.informationArchitecture: Masonry or clean square grid with light-box functionality.
designPlan.visualIntent: Clean, white or off-white background to make the watercolor colors pop.
designPlan.interactionIntent: Click-to-expand lightbox with smooth transitions and caption support.
designPlan.contentStrategy: Let the images lead; use minimal captions for lore context.
designPlan.rationale: A gallery grid is the standard and most effective way to present a collection of high-quality visual assets.

pageContext.title: The World
pageContext.description: Deep dive into the environmental art and lore.

pageDesignPlan.pageGoal: Deep dive into the environmental art and lore.
pageDesignPlan.roleFit: This page primarily serves Potential Viewer.
pageDesignPlan.capabilityFocus: This page should make Immersive Visual Experience understandable and actionable.
pageDesignPlan.taskLoopCoverage: Help users progress through Discovery to Conversion.
pageDesignPlan.narrativeArc: Keep the page tightly focused: establish value, support it, then convert.
pageDesignPlan.layoutStrategy: Use section rhythm, spacing, and contrast to support the evaluation stage of the user journey rather than making every block equally loud.
hierarchy: The first viewport should establish context and value quickly.
Mid-page sections should deepen trust or explain the offer.
Lower-page sections should reduce friction and reinforce action.
pageDesignPlan.transitionStrategy: Make transitions feel intentional through spacing, contrast shifts, and restrained motion rather than decorative separators.
sharedShellNotes: Assume global layout sections frame the page experience.
Keep page-specific sections visually coherent with the shared shell.
constraints: Preserve the given section order unless a wrapper or grouping is required for coherence.
Avoid repetitive section pacing; vary density and emphasis across the page.
pageDesignPlan.rationale: Default page planner framed The World around role needs and the MVP journey rather than isolated sections.
